brand.name: Misana
brand.longTagline: Eighty kilometres. One coast. One house.

home.metaDescription: Misana orchestrates chauffeur, helicopter, cars, yacht and the right addresses on the French Riviera. Eighty kilometres between Saint-Tropez and Menton.
home.heroLead: Chauffeur, helicopter, cars, yacht and the right addresses. From Saint-Tropez to Menton, the coast held from end to end.
home.destinationsLead: From Saint-Tropez to Menton, eighty kilometres of coast we know by name. Eight cities, four heavy with our presence, four held lighter.
home.carsTitle: A fleet to choose, the keys handed in person.
home.yachtsTitle: A day at sea, or a week.
home.trust1Body: Saint-Tropez to Menton. We do not extend beyond. The coast is the brief, and we hold it from end to end.
home.trust2Body: No client name leaves the room. No press, no leak. The discretion that comes with returning year after year.
home.trust3Body: We answer every request within twenty-four hours. With a name, a phone, a route. Not a form.
home.finalTitle: A name, a date, a coast.
home.finalLead: Tell us the date, the route, the address. We answer within twenty-four hours.
home.searchNote: We hold the request consultative until you confirm. Nothing is reserved on send.

home.valueReplyBody: Every request answered within twenty-four hours. With a name, a phone, a route. Not a form.
home.valueDiscretionBody: No client name leaves the room. No press, no leak, no logo. The trust that comes with returning year after year.
home.profilesTitle: A day, a weekend, a week.
home.profilesLead: We hold the route from end to end, whatever the duration. Pick the shape of the stay, we arrange the rest.
home.profileDayBody: Airport pickup, lunch on Pampelonne, dinner in Monaco, the helicopter back. One driver from start to end.
home.profileWeekendBody: Two nights, three lunches, the right table each evening. The yacht for one day, the chauffeur for the other.
home.profileWeekBody: Seven days from end to end of the coast. The flat, the boat, the tables, the helicopter on call. Pre-positioned, ready.
home.conciergeTitle: A named handler, not a form.
home.conciergeLead: Pick up the phone, send an email, send a request. The same person answers and stays with the file from start to end. We work in Riviera hours.
home.partnersTitle: Working with the addresses on the coast.
home.partnersBody: We hold relationships across the coast. If you run a palace, a restaurant, a beach club, a yacht, a villa, and want a quiet route to the right guests, write to us.
home.reachTitle: A name, a phone, a reply.
home.reachBody: Three ways to reach us. The same person on the other end. We answer within twenty-four hours, in Riviera hours.
home.newsletterLead: A note from us, every season. Addresses, routes, what is on the calendar. Nothing else.
home.newsletterThanks: Noted. The next letter will reach you in season.
home.heroIntroBody: We orchestrate your stay on the Riviera, end to end.
home.heroIntroSub: One house, one phone, one reply.

serviceBody.chauffeur: A driver, a sedan, a route held from end to end. Mercedes mostly, Range Rover when the road asks for it. Welcome at the gate, calm at the door.
serviceBody.cars: A fleet to choose, the keys handed in person. Grand tourers and supercars, delivered to the airport, the hotel, the villa.
serviceBody.yacht: A day on Pampelonne or a week along the coast. Boats from fifteen metres to fifty, crew arranged, lunches kept.
serviceBody.helicopter: Riviera heliports, twenty minutes apart. Nice, Monaco, Cannes, Saint-Tropez. Mercedes V-Class included at both ends.
serviceBody.access: A table, a suite, a beach kept for you. The address held, the welcome by name, without the queue.

home.timelineLead: From the Festival de Cannes to the Voiles de Saint-Tropez, the dates that shape the season. We start taking requests three months before each.
home.timelineFootnote: Three months before each, we open the books. Helicopters held, drivers pre-positioned, tables kept.

event.hero: {event} brings the coast to its busiest. We orchestrate the week from end to end. Chauffeurs in place by Tuesday. Tables held from Wednesday. Helicopter on call.
event.servicesSection: What we orchestrate during the event
event.servicesBody: We pre-position drivers, helicopters and tables for the week. The right vehicle, the right table, the right address. Booked early.

services.chauffeur: Drivers in place from Tuesday. Yacht-limo coverage on demand.
services.helicopter: Heliports held. Twenty-minute hops from the coast.
services.access: Tables, terraces, beaches kept for you. Without queue.
services.cars: Performance and supercar fleet, day and week.

event.whenBody: {event} takes place every {month} in {city}. We start taking requests three months before. The week itself is a single piece of orchestration. The earlier the request, the calmer the answer.
event.discretionBody: We work for guests, regulars, the right address. No client name leaves the room. No press, no leak, no logo. The trust that comes with returning year after year.

helicopter.hubLead: Four heliports held, twelve liaisons. Mercedes V-Class at each end. Reply within thirty minutes, the same handler from end to end.
helicopter.hubDescription: Helicopter French Riviera. Liaisons Nice, Monaco, Cannes, Saint-Tropez. Airbus H125, H130, H135, H155, AS355, Bell 429. Flat per-liaison pricing.
helicopter.liaisonsLead: Flat fare per liaison, taxes included, Mercedes V-Class transfer at each heliport. Price is confirmed at booking, never after.
helicopter.step1Body: The liaison you want. Date, time, aircraft if you have a preference.
helicopter.step2Body: Within thirty minutes, by one named handler. Price confirmed, pilot slot booked, V-Class held at both heliports.
helicopter.step3Body: From the lounge to the cabin, no queue. Fifteen minutes later, you are elsewhere on the coast.

seo.title: The helicopter on the Riviera.
seo.p1: On the Riviera the helicopter does not shorten a distance, it deletes a road. Seven minutes between {nice} and {monaco}, twelve between Cannes and Saint-Tropez, eighteen between Cannes and {saintTropez}. Where the car works around the corniche and the summer flow, the aircraft holds the announced hour. Four heliports: Nice, Monaco, Cannes-Mandelieu, Saint-Tropez-La Mole.
seo.p2: We treat inter-heliport hops as a service distinct from the {chauffeur}: a pilot slot, a pre-positioned aircraft, a V-Class at each end. The calculation is rarely only about time. During the {festival} or the {grandPrix}, it is also the only way to link {monaco} and {cannes} without three hours of motorcade.
seo.p3: The aircraft answers to weather. Strong mistral, low ceiling, fog over Cannes: the pilot decides, never us. When that happens, we move the guest to a {chauffeur} transfer or an airport {transfers} with no input on their side. Continuity matters more than the means. That is also why we do not operate alone: we work with the companies that hold the certificates, the pilots and the machines.
seo.p4: Helicopter often pairs with a {yacht} to reach the sea on the same day, a {cars} for the rest of the stay, or an {access} in an address that has to be held. The Riviera {destinations} cover each city in detail, and the {request} sets the whole sequence in one go.

chauffeur.hubTitle: A driver, a route, an hour held.
chauffeur.hubLead: Transfer or full disposal. Mercedes mostly, Range Rover when the road asks for it. Reply within thirty minutes, the same handler from end to end.
chauffeur.hubDescription: Chauffeur service French Riviera. Airport transfers, full disposal, weddings, festivals. Mercedes V-Class, S-Class Maybach, Range Rover Vogue. Flat-route pricing.
chauffeur.fleetVehicleNote: Available for transfer and full disposal.
chauffeur.transfersLead: Flat fare per route, taxes included, welcome at the door. Price is confirmed at booking, never after.
chauffeur.disposalTitle: A day, an evening, an event.
chauffeur.step1Body: The transfer or the day you want. Date, place, vehicle if you have a preference.
chauffeur.step2Body: Within thirty minutes, by one named handler. Price confirmed, driver assigned, contact shared.
chauffeur.step3Body: At the place, on the hour. The same handler stays reachable until your return.

seo.title: The driver on the Riviera.
seo.p1: Across the eighty kilometres between Saint-Tropez and Menton, the car remains the most reliable tool. {nice} and {monaco} sit forty minutes apart, {saintTropez} two hours away, and the whole coast can be reached from Nice airport. Helicopters answer to weather, yachts to seasons, trains to schedules. The driver adapts.
seo.p2: We treat airport {transfers} and full-day disposals as two separate trades. The first demands close reading of traffic, pickup points and terminals. The second calls for a driver who knows the corniche, where to stop for lunch at {capFerrat}, where to wait through a dinner in {cannes}, how to fold the day around a table or a beach held under {access}.
seo.p3: During the {festival} and the {grandPrix}, roads close and hours stretch. Our drivers work alongside the organisations on site. Out of season the rhythm reverses: longer days, more latitude, the same driver across a full stay. The full {events} calendar and its bearing on movement on the coast is laid out in the dedicated section.
seo.p4: The driver rarely stands alone. It pairs with a {cars} for days when guests prefer to drive, a {yacht} for the sea, a {helicopter} for distance. The {destinations} cover each of the eight cities we hold. To set everything in one go, the {request} is the most direct route.

yacht.hubLead: From a fifteen-metre day cruise along Pampelonne to a fifty-metre charter for the week. Boats curated and crewed by our network across Cannes, Monaco, Saint-Tropez and Antibes.
yacht.hubDescription: Yacht charter French Riviera. Day cruise, weekend, week. Sunseeker, Sanlorenzo, Amels. From Cannes, Monaco, Saint-Tropez, Antibes.
yacht.sizesLead: From a fifteen-metre day cruise to a fifty-metre mega yacht for the week. Four formats, each with its own purpose.
yacht.journeysTitle: A few routes we already hold.

riviera-weekend.title: Riviera weekend
riviera-weekend.body: Saint-Tropez on Friday evening, Cannes for Saturday lunch, Monaco for Sunday brunch. The chauffeur waiting at every port. One night aboard, one night in suite.

pampelonne-family.title: Pampelonne with family
pampelonne-family.body: Twelve guests aboard, two tenders, lunch held at Club 55. Anchored from ten to seven. Lifeguard arranged on request, water toys ready.

sardaigne-week.title: Sardinia in a week
sardaigne-week.body: Saint-Tropez to Porto Cervo, weather watched. Two nights at anchor, four nights in port. Provisioning and tables arranged on land, helicopter on call for the Bonifacio crossing.

festival-cannes.title: Festival de Cannes
festival-cannes.body: Anchored facing the Croisette, tender shuttle coordinated with the screenings. Driver on call, a table held every evening. The yacht as base, the festival as plan.

yacht.relatedSection: Other yachts in the same range
yacht.priceFootnote: Indicative charter rates plus VAT and APA. Crew, fuel and provisioning charged separately. Confirmed at booking.
yacht.allDescription: Full catalogue of yachts available for charter on the French Riviera. Filter by size, type, builder, port, amenities. Motor, sailing, catamaran from Cannes, Monaco and Saint-Tropez.

cond.apaBody: Advance Provisioning Allowance, around thirty percent of the charter rate. Covers fuel, dockage, food, beverages and other running costs. Reconciled at the end of the charter.
cond.vatBody: Mediterranean VAT applies according to the cruising itinerary. Confirmed at booking.
cond.fuelBody: Charged on actual usage from the APA. The route is planned to keep the consumption proportionate to the trip.
cond.crewBody: Captain and crew included in the charter rate. Service charge customary at the end of the charter.

included.boat: The yacht, fully maintained, ready at the chosen port
included.concierge: Misana concierge during the charter, twenty-four hours

seo.title: The yacht on the Riviera.
seo.p1: Between {saintTropez} and {monaco}, the sea shortens everything. Pampelonne is reached more easily by boat than by road in August. The coves around {capFerrat} and the bay of Villefranche are taken at anchor, lunch served aboard. Departures run from {cannes}, Antibes, Saint-Tropez and Port Hercule in Monaco. Distances are short: thirty miles end to end.
seo.p2: We work three formats. The day cruise, twelve to eighteen metres, boarding at ten, return by six. The weekend, thirty to forty metres, crew and chef aboard, two to three nights. The week, fifty metres and beyond, usually Saturday to Saturday under MYBA brokerage. The boat pairs with a {chauffeur} for harbour arrivals and an airport {transfers}.
seo.p3: The calendar shapes the sea as well. The {grandPrix} closes certain Monaco moorings but opens the spectator roadsteads. The {festival} thickens the Cannes evenings seen from the water. {cannesYachting} and {monacoYachtShow} in September are the two windows when the coast reads as one floating salon. The detail sits in the {events} pages.
seo.p4: The yacht rarely stands alone. It pairs with a {cars} for the rest of the stay on land, a {helicopter} when distance overcomes the sea advantage, an {access} for tables in the evening. The {destinations} cover each bay in detail. The {request} sets the whole sequence in one go.

access.hubLead: Restaurants, palaces, beach clubs, nightlife. The right address, secured. We hold relationships across the coast so the table, the suite or the lounger is kept for you.
access.hubDescription: Concierge access French Riviera. Restaurants, palaces, beach clubs, nightlife. Le Louis XV, Mirazur, Vague d'Or, Hotel du Cap-Eden-Roc, Carlton, Club 55, Bagatelle, Jimmy'z.

body.restaurant: A table held at one of the most considered restaurants on the coast. The reservation made, the dietary requests passed, the celebration arranged in advance.
body.palace: A suite kept at one of the historic palaces of the coast. Check-in arranged early, the right floor, the views you wanted, the small things that change the stay.
body.beach-club: A lounger reserved on the right beach. The table at lunch held, the bottle in the rosé, the welcome by name. Without the queue.
body.nightclub: A table held at the address of the night. The bottles arranged, the door opened, the discretion preserved.

how.restaurant: We hold direct relationships with maitres d hotel and house managers. The reservation is made by us, the requests are passed in advance, the special occasion is set up before you arrive. We can also arrange the chauffeur from your hotel or villa to the table and back.
how.palace: We work with the palace concierge teams across the coast. We secure the suite that fits the season and the occasion. Early check-in, late check-out, the floor that matters, the view that matters. The transfer from airport or heliport included if requested.
how.beach-club: We secure beach loungers and tables at lunch on the most considered beaches of the coast. The reservation is held, the welcome is by name, the rose is on ice when you arrive. Departure can be arranged by chauffeur or yacht-tender.
how.nightclub: We secure tables and entry at the right address of the night. The bottles arranged, the door opened, the discretion preserved. We can also arrange the chauffeur back to the hotel or villa at any hour.

access.discretionBody: We work for guests, regulars, the right address. No client name leaves the room. No press, no leak, no logo. The trust that comes with returning year after year.

seo.title: Access on the Riviera.
seo.p1: Across eighty kilometres of coast, a handful of addresses hold the attention. Three stars at {monaco} with Le Louis XV, at {menton} with Mirazur, at {saintTropez} with La Vague d'Or. Historic palaces at {capDAntibes}, at {cannes} and at {capFerrat}. Beach clubs along Pampelonne, beaches held under the {capDAntibes}. The phone alone no longer carries the day, especially in season.
seo.p2: We hold direct relations with maîtres d'hôtel, concierges, restaurant directors. No platform in between, no marketplace: the table is asked for from the house, the suite is arranged directly with the establishment. That continuity changes the conversation. Dietary needs travel ahead, the occasion is prepared before arrival, the guest is expected by name.
seo.p3: The calendar tightens everything. During the {festival} and the {grandPrix}, the right addresses close six months out. The {monacoYachtShow} pulls half of Monaco's tables off the public board. The nights around the {festival} open and close on invitation. Our role is to anticipate the window, to hold the promise, never to serve a second address because the first has come back with a no.
seo.p4: Access always pairs with movement. A {chauffeur} to bring the hotel to the table, a {yacht} for the beach, a {helicopter} to return after dinner. The {destinations} cover each city and its book of addresses. The {request} is the shortest way to set the whole stay.

chauffeur.lead: A driver, a sedan, a route held from end to end. Eighty kilometres between Saint-Tropez and Menton.
chauffeur.description: Private chauffeur service French Riviera. Mercedes V-Class, S-Class, E-Class, Range Rover Vogue, Maybach. Welcome at the gate, luggage assistance, English-speaking drivers.
chauffeur.howBody: We pre-position drivers across the coast. Mercedes mostly, Range Rover when terrain or weather asks for it. Flight tracking, luggage assistance, English-speaking. The route adjusted by traffic at that moment, not the GPS by default.

destinations.hubLead: From Saint-Tropez to Menton, eighty kilometres of coast we know by name. Four cities held heavy by our presence, four held lighter.
destinations.hubDescription: Misana destinations French Riviera : Saint-Tropez, Cannes, Nice, Monaco, Cap-Ferrat, Cap-d'Antibes, Eze, Menton. Concierge service from end to end of the coast.
destinations.servicesBody: We orchestrate transport, helicopter, cars, yacht and access in {city}. Eighty kilometres between Saint-Tropez and Menton, all on the coast.

seo.title: Eight cities, an eighty-kilometre ribbon.
seo.p1: The French Riviera reads as one curved line: {saintTropez} to the west, {menton} to the east, and between them six cities that everything separates and everything binds. {cannes} for industry and the festival. {monaco} for finance, sport, statehood. {nice} as the prefecture and the only international airport within an hour. {capFerrat}, {eze} and {capDAntibes} as residential peninsulas, half-way along.
seo.p2: We hold four cities more firmly than the others because that is where our guests spend the most time: Cannes, Monaco, Nice and Saint-Tropez. Dense address book, installed partners, teams used to the rhythm. The other four, {capDAntibes}, {capFerrat}, {eze} and Menton, are held more lightly, through narrower threads: one palace, one table, one trail, one view.
seo.p3: How the cities link shapes the stay. The car for everyday legs, with a {chauffeur} or self-driven through a {cars}. The {helicopter} to cross Saint-Tropez to Monaco quickly. The {yacht} to reach Pampelonne and the coves. Airport {transfers} for the first and last mile. The detail by city sits in each dedicated page.
seo.p4: Across the year, the calendar redraws the coast. The {festival} and the {grandPrix} windows clog, free up and redirect the flows. The full {events} calendar holds the dates. For the right addresses during those windows, {access} concentrates the book. To set a stay around a specific date, the {request} is the shortest route.

events.hubLead: From the Festival de Cannes to the Monaco Yacht Show, the calendar that fills the coast. We orchestrate the stay around the date.
events.hubDescription: Misana events French Riviera : Festival de Cannes, Monaco Grand Prix, Cannes Lions, Monaco Yacht Show, MIPIM, MIPCOM, Cannes Yachting Festival, Saint-Tropez Voiles. Concierge for every date.

cars.hubLead: Grand tourers and supercars. A fleet picked by us, delivered to the airport, the hotel, the villa. Keys handed in person.
cars.hubDescription: Car rental on the French Riviera. Mercedes, Audi RS, Porsche, Ferrari, Lamborghini, Bentley, Rolls-Royce, Aston Martin. Daily rates with all-inclusive insurance.
cars.brandsLead: We work with a handful of manufacturers picked for the coast. Italian for the character, German for the road, British for the quiet.

fiche.relatedSection: Other cars in the same range

included.delivery: Delivery and collection at the place of your choice (airport, hotel, beach, villa)
included.concierge: Misana concierge during the rental, twenty-four hours

cars.allDescription: Full catalogue of cars available for rent on the French Riviera. Filter by category, brand, year, transmission, fuel, seats, city of delivery.

seo.title: The car on the Riviera.
seo.p1: Driving the corniche is not casual. Between {monaco} and {menton}, the lower corniche is taken slowly, the middle offers the photograph, the upper one releases the machine. On the {saintTropez} peninsula, narrow lanes constrain the format. A grand tourer fares better there than a long-wheelbase supercar. Our fleet is selected for these conditions, not for the catalogue.
seo.p2: We deliver the car to the four points that matter: Nice airport, hotels in {cannes}, villas in {capFerrat}, palaces in Monte-Carlo. Keys are handed over directly, the contract is read calmly, insurance is fully included. When driving is not the point, the same day pairs with a {chauffeur} or an airport {transfers}.
seo.p3: Seasons drive the choice. Convertible from April to October, sedan or SUV the rest of the year. During the {festival}, the {grandPrix} or the {events} calendar around Cannes Yachting, some makes are booked six months ahead. We hold dedicated allocations across those windows with our dealer partners on the coast.
seo.p4: The car is rarely the only thread of a stay. It pairs with a {yacht} for the sea, a {helicopter} to clear distance fast, an {access} for tables and clubs. The {destinations} cover each of the eight cities in detail. To set everything in one go, the {request} is the most direct route.

helicopterHub.title: Helicopter charter on the Riviera
helicopterHub.description: Private helicopter charter Riviera. Six aircraft : Airbus H125, H130, AS355, H135, Bell 429, H155. Twelve routes between Nice, Monaco, Cannes Mandelieu, Saint-Tropez La Mole.
helicopterHub.lead: Six aircraft, four hub cities, twelve routes. From the seven minutes Nice-Monaco to the twenty-two minutes Saint-Tropez-Monaco. Mercedes V-Class chauffeur included on departure and arrival.
helicopterHub.matrixLead: Twelve point-to-point routes between the hub cities of the coast. Indicative one-way price, Mercedes V-Class chauffeur included at both ends.
helicopterHub.matrixFootnote: Indicative rates from the lightest single-engine aircraft. Twin-engine and Bell 429 / H155 on request. All prices include Mercedes V-Class chauffeur on departure and arrival, taxes, fuel.
helicopterHub.formTitle: Tell us the route and the date

reassure.responseBody: Within 24 hours, by phone or email.
reassure.contactBody: A named handler, not a form.

about.title: About
about.metaDescription: About Misana, the team for your stay on the French Riviera. Eighty kilometres held end to end, one number, one named handler.
about.heroLead: Eighty kilometres of coast, held by name. The driver at the gate, the table kept, the helicopter on call. The stay shaped without urgency, with care, by a small team.
about.philoBody1: We do not crowd the day. The driver waits when the lunch runs long. The room is held when the boat is late. The pace of the stay belongs to the guest, never the schedule.
about.philoBody2: We work for hosts who return year after year. The same names, the same addresses, the same trust. Each visit is the next chapter, not the first call.
about.storyLead: Misana began as a small idea on the coast. A team that answers the phone, holds the table, sends the driver. Nothing more, nothing performed.

2024.label: The idea, written on a napkin in Cannes.

2025.label: The first guests, by word of mouth only.

2026early.label: The fleet of drivers and the first kept tables.

2026summer.label: Five services, one number, the season holds.

today.label: A team that grows with intention, slowly.

about.storyClose: We continue without urgency. As the coast moves faster, the line stays calm. The same number, the same names, the next stay considered.
about.spacesBody: We work with palaces, restaurants, captains, drivers who care for the same things. Quiet entrances, a welcome by name, the right table at the right hour. The coast is a small place when held by the right people.
about.gallerySub: Quiet moments, kept on the coast.
about.galleryBody: Notes, tables, mornings on a yacht, a road into the village. The coast is not a postcard. It is a sequence of small rights things, held in the right order.
about.ctaBody: Tell us the date, the people, the address. We answer fast, with a name on the line and a road that already knows you.

contact.title: Reach us.
contact.metaDescription: Reach Misana on the French Riviera. Phone, email, contact form. A reply within thirty minutes, in Riviera hours.
contact.lead: Questions about a stay, an address you want held, a date you want considered. The team is here for you.
contact.phoneHours: Available Monday to Saturday, nine in the morning to nine in the evening, Riviera hours.
contact.emailIntro: Pick a subject and write a few lines. The right person on the team replies within thirty minutes.

field.subject: How can we help
field.messagePlaceholder: A few lines about what you have in mind. The date, the people, the address.

contact.newsletterOptin: I agree to receive occasional notes from Misana on the coast. You can unsubscribe at any time.
contact.consent: I agree that Misana stores the information above to reply. Data held in the EU, never shared. See the privacy policy for the details.
contact.errorMessage: The message is a little short. A few more lines please.
contact.errorConsent: Please agree to the data notice to continue.
contact.errorSubmit: Something on our side. Please try again or write to us by email.
contact.thanksBody: The right person will reply within thirty minutes, in Riviera hours.
contact.routesIntro: For specific subjects, the right page often holds the full picture.

request.title: Plan a stay end to end
request.body: The full request flow. Service, dates, people. The named handler replies on the line.

partners.title: Become a partner on the coast
partners.body: Palaces, restaurants, yacht owners, drivers, helicopter operators. Write to us with the details.

press.title: Press and editorial
press.body: For journalists, photographers, editors writing on the coast. Press subject in the form.

careers.title: Join the team
careers.body: Drivers, captains, concierges, customer relations. Open roles posted as they appear.

journal.title: Journal
journal.metaDescription: The Misana journal : essays on the coast, addresses, the small things that matter.
journal.lead: Essays on the coast, addresses, the small things that matter.

mentions.intro: Information about the publisher and host of the misana.com website, in accordance with the French law on confidence in the digital economy of 21 June 2004.

sections.title: Site publisher
sections.body: The misana.com website is published by Misana, [legal form to confirm] with a share capital of [amount to confirm] euros, registered with the Trade and Companies Registry of [city to confirm] under number [SIREN to confirm]. Registered office : [full address to confirm], France. Intra-community VAT number : [to confirm]. Phone : +33 4 00 00 00 00. Email : contact (at) misana.com.

sections.title: Publication director
sections.body: [First name and surname of director, to confirm], acting as [role, to confirm].

sections.title: Hosting
sections.body: The website is hosted by Vercel Inc., 440 N Barranca Avenue #4133, Covina, CA 91723, United States (vercel.com). The operational database is operated by Supabase Inc., with the infrastructure used for Misana located in the European Union (Frankfurt, Germany).

sections.title: Intellectual property
sections.body: The website as a whole, including its structure, texts, photographs, illustrations, pictograms and visual identity, is the exclusive property of Misana or of partners who have granted a usage licence. Any reproduction, representation, modification, publication or adaptation, in whole or in part, without prior written authorisation is prohibited and constitutes an infringement subject to articles L.335-2 and following of the French Intellectual Property Code. Trademarks and logos appearing on the site are registered. Any unauthorised reproduction constitutes an infringement.

sections.title: Photographic credits
sections.body: The photographs displayed on the site are taken by Misana, by partners who have explicitly authorised their use, or sourced from licensed image libraries. Any request relating to credits may be addressed to contact (at) misana.com.

sections.title: Personal data and cookies
sections.body: The processing of your personal data is described in our privacy policy, accessible from the footer. The use of cookies on the site is detailed in our cookies policy.

sections.title: Consumer mediation
sections.body: In accordance with article L.612-1 of the French Consumer Code, you may, for any dispute that has not been resolved directly with Misana, submit the matter free of charge to a consumer mediator [details of the competent mediator to confirm based on activity sector]. Any prior request for amicable settlement should be sent in writing to contact (at) misana.com.

sections.title: Applicable law
sections.body: These legal notices are governed by French law. Any dispute relating to their interpretation or performance falls within the exclusive jurisdiction of the French courts.

cgv.intro: These general terms govern the use of the misana.com website and the relationship between Misana and any person submitting a service request. The applicable version is the one in force at the date of the request.

sections.title: Purpose
sections.body: Misana is a private concierge service operating on the French Riviera, between Saint-Tropez and Menton. Misana arranges services in five domains : chauffeured cars, exceptional vehicle rentals, yacht charter, helicopter flights and access to partner establishments. Misana acts as an intermediary between the client and selected providers, in compliance with applicable professional rules.

sections.title: Service request
sections.body: Any request submitted via the online form, by email or by phone is consultative. It does not constitute a firm booking nor a contractual commitment. Submitting a request triggers a personalised study by our team, followed by a written proposal detailing the service, price, conditions and availability.

sections.title: Acceptance and formation of the contract
sections.body: The contract is formed upon written acceptance of the proposal by the client and, where applicable, payment of the requested deposit. Before this acceptance, no contractual obligation rests on either party. The client acknowledges having received all useful information for decision-making before acceptance.

sections.title: Partner providers
sections.body: Misana selects its providers on the basis of reliability, safety, regulatory compliance and quality of service. Each service is performed by the provider designated in the proposal. Misana remains the client's single point of contact throughout the operation and coordinates exchanges with the provider or providers concerned.

sections.title: Pricing
sections.body: Prices are communicated case by case in the written proposal, in euros and inclusive of taxes where applicable. Unless otherwise stated, they do not include gratuities, excess waiting time, road tolls, port fees, tourist taxes, or any unforeseen surcharges arising from particular requests made during the service.

sections.title: Payment terms
sections.body: Unless otherwise agreed, a deposit is requested upon confirmation of the service. The balance is due in accordance with the terms set out in the accepted proposal. Payment is made by bank transfer or by any other means indicated by Misana. Any sum unpaid by the due date may, after a formal notice without effect, give rise to late-payment penalties at the legal rate in force.

sections.title: Cancellation and amendment
sections.body: Any cancellation or amendment must be notified in writing to contact (at) misana.com. The cancellation conditions specific to each service are set out in the proposal accepted by the client and may include a partial or total retention based on the notice period and the commitments made to the provider. In the event of cancellation by Misana or the provider for reasons beyond their control, sums paid are fully refunded.

sections.title: Force majeure
sections.body: Neither party shall be held liable for non-performance linked to a force majeure event within the meaning of article 1218 of the French Civil Code, including weather conditions making the service impossible or unsafe, administrative restrictions, social action, or any external event beyond the parties' control. In such a case, the parties shall give priority to a rescheduling solution.

sections.title: Liability
sections.body: Misana undertakes a best-efforts obligation in the selection and coordination of providers. Operational liability for each service rests with the provider concerned, who carries its own professional insurance. Misana shall not be held liable for indirect damages, loss of profits, moral damages, or damages resulting from a force majeure event or from a fault of the client.

sections.title: Complaints
sections.body: Any complaint relating to a service must be addressed in writing to contact (at) misana.com within fifteen days following the end of the service, together with all useful supporting elements. Misana endeavours to provide a substantive reply as soon as possible and gives priority to amicable resolution of any disagreement.

sections.title: Personal data
sections.body: The processing of personal data communicated in connection with a request or service is governed by our privacy policy, accessible from the footer of the site.

sections.title: Applicable law and jurisdiction
sections.body: These general terms are governed by French law. In the event of a dispute, the parties shall first seek an amicable solution. Failing this, the French courts shall have exclusive jurisdiction, subject to mandatory protective provisions applicable to consumers.

privacy.intro: Misana takes particular care of the protection of your personal data. This policy informs you about the nature of the data collected, the purposes of processing, retention periods and the rights you hold, in accordance with the General Data Protection Regulation 2016/679 (GDPR) and the French Data Protection Act of 6 January 1978 as amended.

sections.title: Data controller
sections.body: The data controller is Misana, whose full contact details appear in the legal notices. For any question regarding your data, please write to contact (at) misana.com.

sections.title: Data collected
sections.body: Misana collects only the data you actively transmit, primarily via the request form, the contact form, or by email. This includes : your first and last name, email address, phone number, preferred language, the nature of your request (service, dates, city, context) and the free-text content of your message. No sensitive data within the meaning of article 9 of the GDPR is requested or required to handle your enquiry.

sections.title: Purposes and legal bases
sections.body: Your data is processed to respond to your request, organise and coordinate the service, ensure follow-up of the relationship and, where appropriate, send you communications relating to your file. The legal basis is the performance of pre-contractual measures taken at your request, or the performance of the contract once concluded. Where you give your consent to receive our editorial letter, processing relies on this consent, which can be withdrawn at any time.

sections.title: Recipients
sections.body: Your data is accessible only to members of the Misana team who need it to handle your request, as well as to our technical processors acting on our instructions : Supabase Inc. (database hosting, infrastructure in the European Union), Vercel Inc. (web hosting), and a transactional email provider. Your data is never sold, rented or transferred to third parties for commercial purposes.

sections.title: Transfers outside the European Union
sections.body: Some of our technical providers are established in the United States, notably Vercel for web hosting. These transfers are governed by the standard contractual clauses adopted by the European Commission, ensuring a level of data protection equivalent to that in force in the European Union.

sections.title: Retention periods
sections.body: Data relating to a consultative request without follow-up is kept for thirty-six months from the last contact, for commercial follow-up purposes. Data relating to a service performed is kept for the duration of the contractual relationship, then archived for ten years for accounting and tax purposes in accordance with legal obligations. Subscribers to the editorial letter may unsubscribe at any time ; their contact data is then deleted as soon as possible.

sections.title: Your rights
sections.body: In accordance with the GDPR, you have a right of access, rectification, erasure, restriction and portability of your data, as well as a right to object to processing and to withdraw your consent at any time. You may also set instructions concerning the fate of your data after death. To exercise these rights, write to contact (at) misana.com indicating the subject of your request. A reply will be provided within one month, which may be extended by two months given the complexity of the request.

sections.title: Complaint to the CNIL
sections.body: If, after contacting us, you consider that your rights are not respected, you may submit a complaint to the French data protection authority (CNIL), 3 place de Fontenoy, TSA 80715, 75334 Paris Cedex 07, or via its website www.cnil.fr.

sections.title: Security
sections.body: Misana implements appropriate technical and organisational measures to protect your data against loss, unauthorised access, alteration or disclosure. Access to data is strictly limited to authorised persons, and the transfer of data through the site is encrypted (HTTPS).

sections.title: Cookies
sections.body: The use of cookies on the site is governed by a dedicated policy, accessible from the footer.

cookies.intro: This policy describes the use of cookies and trackers on the misana.com website. Misana favours sobriety : only cookies strictly necessary for the operation of the site are placed without your prior consent.

sections.title: What is a cookie
sections.body: A cookie is a small text file placed on your device when you visit a website. It allows the site to store information relating to your browsing, for technical, statistical, personalisation or advertising purposes. The management of cookies is governed by the ePrivacy directive and by the recommendations of the French data protection authority (CNIL).

sections.title: Cookies used on misana.com
sections.body: Misana uses exclusively cookies strictly necessary for the operation of the site and exempt from consent, in accordance with CNIL recommendations. No third-party audience-measurement, targeted advertising or social-media cookie is placed without your explicit prior consent.

sections.title: List of cookies placed
sections.body:
Session cookies : maintain the state of the request form during your visit. Lifetime : the browsing session.

Preference cookies : storage of your preferred language (French or English) between visits. Lifetime : twelve months.

Security cookies : protection against automated form submissions (anti-spam and anti-abuse). Lifetime : variable, generally short.

sections.title: Audience measurement
sections.body: Misana does not deploy Google Analytics nor any third-party tracking tool by default. Should an audience-measurement tool be introduced later, it will rely on a privacy-respectful tool exempt from consent, in accordance with CNIL conditions (immediate anonymisation, no cross-referencing, strictly statistical purpose).

sections.title: Manage your cookies
sections.body: You may at any time configure your browser to refuse or delete cookies placed. Disabling cookies strictly necessary may impair the operation of the request form and of some features of the site. Help links for the main browsers can be found on the official pages of Chrome, Firefox, Safari and Edge.

sections.title: Updates to this policy
sections.body: This policy may be updated to reflect changes to the site and to usage practices. The applicable version is the one published on the date of your visit. In the event of substantial change, a visible notice will be displayed.

transfer.hubLead: Twenty popular routes, fixed indicative fares. Mercedes, Range Rover, Maybach. Welcome at the gate, luggage assistance, English-speaking drivers.
transfer.hubDescription: Private chauffeur transfers French Riviera. Nice airport to Cannes, Monaco, Saint-Tropez, Cap-Ferrat. Mercedes V-Class, S-Class, Range Rover Vogue.
transfer.hero: A driver, a sedan, the right name on the sign. Eighty kilometres between Saint-Tropez and Menton. We hold the route from end to end.
transfer.howBody: We track flight times. The driver is at the gate. Bags are handled. The route is decided by traffic at that moment, not the GPS by default. The arrival is on time, in calm.
transfer.fleetBody: Mercedes mostly. Range Rover Vogue when terrain or weather asks for it. All vehicles maintained, glass tinted, water, phone chargers, the small things that matter.

included.welcome: Welcome at the gate, name on the sign
included.flightTracking: Flight tracking, no penalty for delays

faq.q1: What if my flight is delayed?
faq.a1: We track every commercial and private flight in real time. The driver waits up to sixty minutes after landing for commercial flights, thirty minutes for private aviation, with no surcharge.
faq.q2: Can I add a stop on the way?
faq.a2: Yes. We do this often, especially for restaurant arrivals, baggage drops at the hotel, or a private call by the road. Mention it in the request.
faq.a3: Yes. Infant seats (zero to two years), child seats (two to four), boosters (four to ten) are complimentary. Mention the count and ages in the request.
